param.value: "Admin dashboard is displayed with KPI tiles"
"Admin can open the Create Team dialog"

param.value: "Project Manager logs in with valid credentials"
"PM dashboard is displayed with quick action cards"
"PM can open the Create Project dialog"

param.value: "PM can create a new project and it appears in My Projects"
